modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need help with Python installation on Windows.

full_description_text:  
So, I’m trying to get Python set up on my Windows machine. I’ve been following some guides, but it’s just not happening. I really need to install Python, you know? It’s crucial for my work, and I’m stuck here.
short_description: Need help with Python installation on Windows.
description: So, I’m trying to get Python set up on my Windows machine. I’ve been following some guides, but it’s just not happening. I really need to install Python, you know? It’s crucial for my work, and I’m stuck here.
